Introduction
    Four African American women, profane and brassy, bring stand-up comedy to the Orpheum Theater in Memphis, Tennessee. Miss Laura Hayes opens the show and serves as emcee. She tells family stories about her grandchildren, her mother...

Filming locations: Orpheum Theatre - 203 South Main Street, Memphis, Tennessee, USA
